name: Application → Homework / Bonding → Booking → Show-Up Nurture
summary: The follow-up for a high-ticket Application Funnel (the 'take-away sale'). After a prospect submits the application, this sequence delivers HOMEWORK / bonding videos (so they sell themselves before the call), drives them to BOOK the qualification call, then maximizes SHOW-UP and re-books no-shows. The application itself is a take-away — copy stays in 'we're selective, prove you're a fit' frame, never 'please buy'.

trigger.primary_event: Application form submitted (Page 2 of the Application Funnel)
exit_conditions: Disqualified applicants routed out / to a lower-ticket offer
Call completed -> route to post-call close or onboarding
segmentation_inputs: Qualified vs not (from application answers — budget/fit fields)

sequence.step: Homework email(s) — bonding videos + take-away frame
sequence.beat: Get the prospect to sell THEMSELVES before the call. Deliver the homework/bonding videos from the Application Funnel thank-you page; pre-frame the call as a selective fit-check, not a sales call.
sequence.delay: Immediately on application, then a bonding touch before the call
sequence.subject_angle: "Your application is in — watch this before we talk"
sequence.body_framework: Epiphany Bridge bonding video(s): the founder's origin story + client transformation case studies (the same proof from Page 1 credibility video), plus a take-away line ('we only work with a few people, so the call is to make sure it's a fit both ways'). Single CTA = book the call.
sequence.copy_notes: Take-away sale frame throughout — the prospect must want IN, not be chased.

sequence.step: Book-the-call reminders for applicants who didn't book
sequence.beat: Convert applied-but-not-booked into a scheduled call.
sequence.delay: +few hours, +1 day, +2 days if still unbooked
sequence.subject_angle: "Last step: grab your call time" / "Did you forget to book?"
sequence.body_framework: Jim Edwards 'If you want X, do this' — one instruction (pick a time on the calendar), restate what they'll get on the call (a plan / clarity), single CTA to the booking widget. Honest scarcity on call availability ('only a few slots this week') if true.
sequence.branch: If booked -> stop booking-push, enter pre-call show-up track.

sequence.beat: Maximize show-up and arrive pre-sold. Reminders + one more bonding asset so they come prepared and warm.
sequence.delay: On booking (confirm), 1 day before, 1 hour before
sequence.subject_angle: "Your call is confirmed for [time]" / "See you in 1 hour"
sequence.body_framework: Confirmation + Soap Opera 'Hidden Benefits' energy (what their life looks like after) + logistics (time, link, what to prepare). Reinforce the take-away frame: 'come ready to show us you're a fit'.

sequence.beat: Recover no-shows and cancellations back onto the calendar.
sequence.delay: Within 1-2h of missed call, then +1 day
sequence.body_framework: Warm, non-needy re-invite (take-away preserved: 'we held your spot, but we can only hold it so long'). Single CTA back to the calendar. Honest scarcity on remaining slots.
sequence.branch: Re-booked -> back into pre-call show-up track. Persistent no-show after N attempts -> downsell to a self-serve / lower-ticket offer or long-term nurture.

copy_persona.primary: Expert Secrets / DotCom Secrets (Application Funnel = take-away sale) — Epiphany Bridge bonding videos + take-away framing.
scripts_used: Epiphany Bridge (Expert Secrets) — origin story + client case-study transformation in the homework/bonding videos
Take-away sale frame (Application Funnel) — 'apply / prove you're a fit', never 'please buy'
Soap Opera 'Hidden Benefits' energy in the pre-call confirmation (future-pace the outcome)
copy_persona.support_persona: jim-edwards-copywriting-secrets — 'If you want X, do this' booking nudges, honest scarcity on call slots, single-CTA discipline, subject lines.
copy_persona.structural_persona: russell-brunson-the-funnel-hackers-cookbook — Application Funnel recipe: credibility/case-study video page -> application form (prospect sells themselves) -> thank-you/homework page with bonding videos + calendar booking; closed by phone (setter -> closer).

ghl_build.engine: Skill 44 (caf) builds the workflow(s); GHL native calendar + Appointment Status triggers drive the booking/show-up/no-show branches.
ghl_build.workflow_name: FSF — Application: Homework -> Book -> Show-Up -> Rebook

trigger_config.ghl_trigger: Form Submitted = application form (or Tag Added `application-submitted`)
trigger_config.qualification: If/Else on application custom fields (budget/fit) -> tag `app-qualified` vs `app-disqualified` and route disqualified to a separate path
trigger_config.calendar_triggers: GHL Appointment Status = Booked / No-Show / Cancelled drive phases C and D

actions_in_order: 1. Email + SMS — Homework / bonding video; tag `application-submitted`
2. If/Else qualification -> disqualified branch (route to lower-ticket) ; qualified continue
3. Wait 4 hours -> If/Else `appointment-booked`? FALSE -> Send Email/SMS booking nudge #1
4. Wait 1 day -> still unbooked? -> booking nudge #2
5. Wait 1 day -> still unbooked? -> booking nudge #3 (honest scarcity)
--- Separate workflow triggered by Appointment Booked: ---
B1. Send confirmation Email + SMS; tag `call-booked`; stop booking-push
B2. Wait until 1 day before -> reminder + pre-call homework
B3. Wait until 1 hour before -> SMS reminder
--- Separate workflow triggered by Appointment No-Show/Cancelled: ---
C1. Wait 1-2h -> Send 'we missed you' Email + SMS rebook CTA
C2. Wait 1 day -> second rebook nudge; after N misses -> tag `app-persistent-noshow` -> downsell/nurture
ghl_build.goal_event: Call completed / sale -> exit nurture; route to onboarding or post-call close.
ghl_build.notes: Cleanest as 3 linked GHL workflows: (1) application -> homework + booking push, (2) Appointment Booked -> show-up nurture, (3) Appointment No-Show/Cancelled -> rebook. caf builds each; the GHL native calendar provides Booked/No-Show/Cancelled triggers (no custom webhook needed).

books: The Funnel Hacker's Cookbook (Application Funnel: credibility video -> application -> homework/thank-you with bonding videos + booking; setter->closer phone close)
DotCom Secrets / Expert Secrets (Application / High-Ticket / Phone Funnel = take-away sale; Epiphany Bridge)
Copywriting Secrets — Jim Edwards ('If you want X', honest scarcity, single CTA)
source.fidelity_note: Homework/bonding videos, the take-away frame, and the booking->phone-close structure are taken from the Application Funnel recipe. No invented mechanics.

flexibility.principle: This template is a recommended default and a resource — it is NEVER a rule or a requirement.
flexibility.mode_1_user_has_explicit_desire: Do exactly what the user wants. This template is an optional reference only; it is never imposed or overridden onto their choice.
flexibility.mode_2_user_is_unsure: Suggest this proven template and explain why it works, but let the user decide.
flexibility.mode_3_user_wants_it_handled: Build the whole automation from this template.
flexibility.note: Always overridable, mixable, customizable, or ignorable. It assists; it does not dominate.
